ddls:
CREATE TABLE "multimodal_data" (
  "multimodal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multimodal data point */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author who contributed the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of multimodal data (e.g., auditory, visual, tactile) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path or URL of the multimodal data */,
  "x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the data point */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the data point */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms associated with the data point (e.g., auditory, speech) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the data point (e.g., #FFF1A9) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score associated with the data point (e.g., 0.180487) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the multimodal data */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data point is private or publicly accessible */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multimodal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Author's name */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Author's affiliation */,
  "role" TEXT /* Author's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the multimodal_data table */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the authors table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "multimodal_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the multimodal_data table */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the authors table */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms associated with the data point (e.g., auditory, speech) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score associated with the data point (e.g., 0.180487) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "multimodal_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the multimodal_data table */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., heatmap, scatter plot) */,
  "params" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the multimodal_data table */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the authors table */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the author (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
